commit_scope: Admit a connected-tissue fourth-arm pass cluster: static-to-dynamic-cells, native-route-goal-cells, pack-manifest, reference-packs, and shamballa-symbol-packs.

commands: coord claim fourth-residual-pass-cluster-2 "survey next non-overlapping fourth-arm pass rows from merged main; avoid multi-source summary, Android execution runner, active BML/Hati lanes, and node/substrate constructor fixes"
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/adler32.fk form-stdlib/pack-manifest.fk form-stdlib/tests/pack-manifest-band.fk
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh static-to-dynamic-cells native-route-goal-cells pack-manifest reference-packs shamballa-symbol-packs

python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
for i, line in enumerate(Path('docs/system_audit/model_executor_runs.jsonl').read_text().splitlines(), 1):
    json.loads(line)
print('OK jsonl rows', i)
PY
local_validation.notes: Admitted five connected-tissue pass rows that already measured four-way on the rebased tree: static-to-dynamic-cells=262143, native-route-goal-cells=1048575, pack-manifest=1023, reference-packs=1023, and shamballa-symbol-packs=1023. The first gate attempt exposed missing core.fk metadata in the two BML test-band prelude comments; adding core.fk to those prelude lines made the manifest gate match the focused validation path. After rebasing over sibling PRs #3033-#3035, full Form validation reports fourth arm: 174 band(s) four-way, 580 ok, and 0 divergent. The metal audit passed Android object/executable shape receipts; local execution skipped because qemu-aarch64 is unavailable and the Docker image is not local unless opt-in pull is enabled.
